name: Masked Ninja Ebisu
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>覆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>面</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヱビス
desc: Once per turn, if you control a "Ninja" monster other than "Masked Ninja Ebisu": You can activate this effect; return Spells/Traps your opponent controls to the hand, equal to the number of "Ninja" monsters you control, also each of your "Goe Goe the Gallant Ninja" can attack directly this turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if you control a "Ninja" monster other than "Masked Ninja Ebisu": You can activate this effect; return Spells/Traps your opponent controls to the hand, equal to the number of "Ninja" monsters you control, also each of your "Goe Goe the Gallant Ninja" can attack directly this turn.
eff: Once per turn, if you control a "Ninja" monster other than "Masked Ninja Ebisu": You can activate this effect; return Spells/Traps your opponent controls to the hand, equal to the number of "Ninja" monsters you control, also each of your "Goe Goe the Gallant Ninja" can attack directly this turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
